prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约12705→16316→18676→17664→15555，整体呈后移趋势，2025年反弹至15555名，较2024年前移约2100名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年23人→2022年21人→2023年18人→2024年18人→2025年22人；2026年计划大幅增至32人，较2025年扩招约45%，显著增加录取机会，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第58名，近年排名稳定在52–61区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗事件），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第69，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等；教育学A、地理学A、马克思主义理论A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，师范类与人文社科底蕴深厚，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类社会热度分化观望，计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程类高热推荐，该校物理类招生专业涵盖统计学、自动化、能源动力等热门方向；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争加剧；南京师范大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对陕西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在陕招生计划近年持续增加，2026年扩招幅度尤为显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15555名、2026年大幅扩招约45%使录取机会增加、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热情、本省物理类考生增加约19.7%加剧竞争等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增幅对冲后，预计2026年最低录取位次较；预测最低位次约19946名，区间19446–20446名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 12705 → 16316 → 18676 → 17664 → 15555, showing an overall backward trend, with a rebound to 15555 in 2025, moving forward about 2100 places compared to 2024; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 23 in 2021 → 21 in 2022 → 18 in 2023 → 18 in 2024 → 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 32, an expansion of about 45% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission opportunities and easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 58th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 52–61 range in recent years, placing it at the mid-to-upper level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affair during marriage, mistaken display of the Rising Sun flag), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, with an average evaluation and moderate short video exposure; Education A, Geography A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, with deep foundations in teacher training and humanities and social sciences, providing sustained appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Teacher/education social popularity is divided and wait-and-see, while computer, electronic information, and electrical engineering categories are highly recommended; the university's physics category enrollment majors include popular directions such as statistics, automation, and energy and power; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi has been increasing in recent years, with a particularly significant expansion in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 15555, the significant 45% expansion in 2026 increasing admission opportunities, negative reputation events possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and the 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees intensifying competition, the expansion effect and examinee increase offset each other; the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 19946, with a range of 19446–20446.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history categories were approximately 1142 → 1897 → 1631 → 2133 → 1938, showing an overall backward trend. In the last three years, it fluctuated between 1631 and 2133, with a baseline of about 1938 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history enrollment plan was 12 in 2021 → 14 in 2022 → 17 in 2023 → 17 in 2024 → 13 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 19, an expansion of about 46% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 58th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 52–61 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean was dismissed for extramarital affairs during marriage, and the Rising Sun flag was mistakenly hung), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 69, rated as average. It has strong disciplines: Education A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, and Marxist Theory A, with outstanding strength in teacher training and humanities/social sciences, maintaining continuous appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Teacher training/education majors have mixed social popularity; law is recommended, Chinese language/Chinese literature is recommended. In 2026, Shaanxi Province has about 88,500 history category candidates, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi liberal arts candidates. Its liberal arts enrollment plan in Shaanxi shows a significant expansion in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1938, the significant expansion of about 46% in 2026 increasing admission opportunities, negative reputation events possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and a 17% increase in provincial history category candidates, the expansion effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be lower; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2555, with a range of 2095–3015.
